APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL FOR PLTF/RESPONDENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLTF/RESPONDENT. DEFT/APPELLANT ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. ABSENT A FURTHER STRONGER SHOWING, THE COURT DENIES THE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE BY COUNSEL FOR PLTF/RESPONDENT AND ORDERS A DISMISSAL FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE. COUNSEL FOR DEFT/APPELLANT TO PROVIDE THE FORM OF ORDER. REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-18-2005 IN DEPT 514. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., CLERK: V. MACK, REPORTER: K. FARNSWORTH CSR 5162
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR EXEMPTION FROM LABOR CODE'S DE NOVO APPEAL BOND REQUIREMENT (NO S.A.S.E. PROVIDED; NO COPIES PROVIDED EITHER)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT BERNARD CALLOWAY SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY WAY OF HIS WAGE CLAIM ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANT/APPELLANT SAN FRANCISCO BARBER COLLEGE, INC. THE ACTION IS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
